original-actions: Awakens aboard an Imperial prison ship docked in Seyda Neen
Completes registration at the Census and Excise Office to receive release papers
Accepts the coded package and orders to find Caius Cosades in Balmora
Travels to Balmora and locates Caius Cosades in his home
Delivers the Emperor's sealed package and joins the Blades as a Novice
Accepts orders to gather information on the Nerevarine Cult and Sixth House
Meets Hasphat Antabolis at the Balmora Fighters Guild and agrees to retrieve a Dwemer artifact
Enters the Dwemer ruin Arkngthand and retrieves the Dwemer puzzle box
Returns the puzzle box and receives notes on the Sixth House cult
Visits Sharn gra-Muzgob at the Balmora Mages Guild
Travels to the Andrano Ancestral Tomb and retrieves the Skull of Llevule Andrano
Delivers the skull and receives notes on the Nerevarine Cult
Travels to Vivec City and speaks with three informants about the prophecies
Locates Hassour Zainsubani in Ald'ruhn and learns Ashlander customs
Reports findings to Caius Cosades and receives promotion to Blades Finder
Travels north to the Urshilaku Camp to meet the Ashlander leaders
Presents gifts to Ashkhan Sul-Matuul and requests initiation into the tribe
Enters the Urshilaku Burial Caverns and retrieves the Bonebiter Bow of Sul-Senipul
Returns the bow to Sul-Matuul and is named Clanfriend of the Ashlanders
Speaks with Wise Woman Nibani Maesa about the Nerevarine prophecies
Returns to Caius and receives orders to destroy a Sixth House base near Gnaar Mok
Infiltrates the Sixth House base at Ilunibi caverns
Confronts and slays the Ash Ghoul priest Dagoth Gares in combat
Contracts Corprus disease from Dagoth Gares's dying curse
Returns to Caius and learns of Divayth Fyr, who may have a cure
Travels to Tel Fyr and presents a Dwemer artifact to the wizard Divayth Fyr
Agrees to retrieve the Dwemer Boots of Flying in exchange for the cure
Enters the Corprusarium beneath Tel Fyr
Navigates past the afflicted inmates without harming them
Locates Yagrum Bagarn, the last living Dwemer, and receives the boots
Returns the boots to Divayth Fyr and receives the experimental cure potion
Drinks the potion and survives, becoming immune to all disease while retaining Corprus
Returns to Balmora and learns Caius has been recalled to the Imperial City
Receives final orders to find the lost prophecies and bring them to Nibani Maesa
Travels to the Hall of Wisdom in Vivec to locate Mehra Milo
Discovers Mehra has been taken to the Ministry of Truth prison
Acquires the prison key and infiltrates the Ministry of Truth
Frees Mehra Milo from her cell and gives her a Divine Intervention scroll to escape
Meets Blatta Hateria on the Ebonheart docks and requests passage to Holamayan
Travels by boat to the secret monastery of the Dissident Priests
Enters Holamayan at dawn or dusk when Azura's magic unseals the entrance
Speaks with Gilvas Barelo and receives the lost prophecy texts
Returns the prophecy texts to Nibani Maesa at the Urshilaku Camp
Learns of the Third Trial and the riddle of the Cavern of the Incarnate
Deciphers the riddle by speaking with Urshilaku Ashlanders
Travels to the Valley of the Wind in the Ashlands, marked by Airan's Teeth
Waits at the cavern entrance for dawn or dusk, when Azura's Star appears
Enters the Cavern of the Incarnate during the magical twilight hours
Takes the Moon-and-Star ring from the statue of Azura
Receives Azura's vision confirming identity as the Nerevarine reborn
Speaks with the ghosts of failed Incarnates and receives their enchanted gifts
Returns to Nibani Maesa to learn of the remaining trials
Travels to Ald'ruhn and speaks with Athyn Sarethi about becoming Hortator
Infiltrates Venim Manor and rescues Varvur Sarethi from imprisonment
Returns Varvur to his father and earns Athyn Sarethi's vote for Hortator
Convinces the other Redoran councilors to vote for Hortator
Challenges Archmaster Bolvyn Venim after he refuses to support the claim
Duels and defeats Bolvyn Venim in the Vivec Arena
Returns to Athyn Sarethi and is named Hortator of House Redoran
Travels to Vivec and meets Crassius Curio to learn about Hlaalu politics
Secures votes from Crassius Curio, Dram Bero, and Yngling Half-Troll
Confronts Orvas Dren at his stronghold and convinces or eliminates him
Secures the remaining votes from Velanda Omani and Nevena Ules
Returns to Crassius Curio and is named Hortator of House Hlaalu
Travels to Tel Vos and speaks with Master Aryon, who immediately supports the claim
Convinces or intimidates Mistress Dratha in Tel Mora to support the claim
Raises Master Neloth's disposition and secures his vote in Sadrith Mora
Speaks with the addled Mistress Therana in Tel Branora and gains her support
Slays Archmagister Gothren when he refuses to acknowledge the claim
Returns to Master Aryon and is named Hortator of House Telvanni
Returns to Sul-Matuul, who names the Clanfriend as Urshilaku Nerevarine
Travels to the Ahemmusa Camp in the Grazelands
Speaks with Wise Woman Sinnammu Mirpal about gaining the tribe's recognition
Clears the Daedric shrine of Ald Daedroth of hostile creatures
Escorts Sinnammu Mirpal safely into the inner shrine of Ald Daedroth
Is named Ahemmusa Nerevarine and receives the Madstone of the Ahemmusa
Travels to the Zainab Camp southwest of Vos
Speaks with Wise Woman Sonummu Zabamat and learns of the Ashkhan's demands
Presents Exquisite Shoes to Ashkhan Kaushad to gain an audience
Learns Kaushad desires a high-born Telvanni bride
Purchases a slave girl from Tel Aruhn and disguises her as a Telvanni noblewoman
Presents the "bride" to Kaushad and is named Zainab Nerevarine
Travels to the Erabenimsun Camp south of Tel Aruhn
Speaks with Wise Woman Manirai and learns the Ashkhan will never accept an outlander
Slays Ashkhan Ulath-Pal and his three hostile supporters in combat
Recovers the sacred items from the slain warriors
Presents the sacred items to Gulakhan Han-Ammu and convinces him to become Ashkhan
Is named Erabenimsun Nerevarine by the new Ashkhan
Receives a summons from Archcanon Tholer Saryoni
Travels to the High Fane in Vivec and meets with the Archcanon
Learns that Vivec wishes to meet with the Nerevarine
Enters the Palace of Vivec and speaks with the god-king
Listens to Vivec's account of the Tribunal's history and Dagoth Ur's return
Receives the gauntlet Wraithguard from Vivec
Learns the plan to sever the Heart of Lorkhan using Kagrenac's Tools
Receives the locations of Sunder and Keening on the map
Travels to the Ghostfence and enters the ashlands within Red Mountain's crater
Enters the Sixth House citadel of Vemynal
Battles through Ash Creatures and reaches the Hall of Torque
Slays the Ash Vampire Dagoth Vemyn and claims Sunder from his corpse
Enters the Sixth House citadel of Odrosal
Defeats the Ash Vampire Dagoth Odros and takes his key
Ascends the Tower of Odrosal and claims Keening
Equips Wraithguard before handling Sunder and Keening to avoid fatal harm
Enters Dagoth Ur's citadel at the heart of Red Mountain
Navigates through the Facility Cavern toward the inner sanctum
Confronts Dagoth Ur, who offers the Nerevarine a place at his side
Refuses Dagoth Ur's offer and initiates combat
Defeats Dagoth Ur's physical form, knowing it will regenerate
Takes the ring from Dagoth Ur's body and enters the Akulakhan Chamber
Equips Wraithguard and Sunder while facing the Heart of Lorkhan
Strikes the Heart of Lorkhan once with Sunder to weaken it
Strikes the Heart of Lorkhan five times with Keening to destroy it
Watches as Dagoth Ur perishes and Akulakhan collapses into ruin
Escapes the crumbling chamber as Red Mountain shakes
Returns to the Facility Cavern and meets the apparition of Azura
Listens as Azura proclaims the prophecy fulfilled and the curse lifted
Receives the Ring of Azura as a token of the Daedric Prince's favor
Emerges from Red Mountain as the Nerevarine, savior of Morrowind
generalized-actions: Awakens aboard an imperial prison ship docked at port
Completes bureaucratic registration to receive release papers
Accepts coded package and orders to locate spymaster contact
Travels to provincial city and locates spymaster at safehouse
Delivers sealed orders and joins intelligence agency as novice
Accepts orders to gather intelligence on cult and enemy faction
Meets contact at fighters guild, agrees to retrieve ancient artifact
Enters ancient ruin and retrieves puzzle artifact
Returns artifact and receives intelligence notes on enemy cult
Visits contact at mages guild for information exchange
Travels to ancestral tomb and retrieves sacred skull
Delivers relic and receives notes on prophetic cult
Travels to holy city and speaks with informants about prophecies
Locates nomad contact and learns indigenous customs
Reports findings to handler and receives promotion in agency
Travels to nomad camp to meet tribal leaders
Presents gifts to chieftain and requests tribal initiation
Enters sacred burial caverns and retrieves ancestral weapon
Returns heirloom to chieftain and is named friend of tribe
Speaks with tribal oracle about messianic prophecies
Returns to handler and receives orders to destroy enemy base
Infiltrates enemy cult base in coastal caverns
Confronts and slays enemy priest in combat
Contracts supernatural disease from dying enemy's curse
Returns to handler and learns of hermit who may cure disease
Travels to wizard's tower and presents artifact as tribute
Agrees to retrieve enchanted boots in exchange for cure
Enters plague ward beneath wizard's tower
Navigates past afflicted inmates without harming them
Locates last survivor of ancient race and receives boots
Returns boots to wizard and receives experimental cure potion
Drinks potion and survives, becoming immune to disease
Returns to base and learns handler has been recalled
Receives final orders to find lost prophecies for oracle
Travels to temple archive to locate dissident contact
Discovers contact has been taken to religious prison
Acquires prison key and infiltrates religious prison
Frees contact from cell and provides escape scroll
Meets smuggler at docks and requests passage to hidden monastery
Travels by boat to secret monastery of dissident priests
Enters monastery at sacred hour when magic unseals entrance
Speaks with senior priest and receives lost prophecy texts
Returns prophecy texts to tribal oracle at nomad camp
Learns of sacred trial and riddle of holy cavern
Deciphers riddle by consulting tribal elders
Travels to sacred valley marked by natural landmark
Waits at cavern entrance for sacred hour of twilight
Enters holy cavern during magical twilight hours
Takes sacred ring from divine statue
Receives divine vision confirming identity as prophesied reborn hero
Speaks with ghosts of failed predecessors and receives enchanted gifts
Returns to oracle to learn of remaining trials
Travels to noble house stronghold to seek war-leader title
Infiltrates noble manor and rescues captive ally
Returns captive to father and earns councilor's vote
Convinces remaining councilors to vote for war-leader title
Challenges house archmaster after he refuses support
Duels and defeats archmaster in formal arena combat
Returns to ally and is named war-leader of first noble house
Travels to merchant city and meets contact about house politics
Secures votes from three influential councilors
Confronts crime lord at stronghold and convinces or eliminates him
Secures remaining votes from holdout councilors
Returns to contact and is named war-leader of second noble house
Travels to wizard tower and speaks with mage who supports claim
Convinces or intimidates hostile councilor to support claim
Raises aloof councilor's disposition and secures vote
Speaks with unstable councilor and gains support despite madness
Slays hostile archmage when he refuses to acknowledge claim
Returns to ally and is named war-leader of third noble house
Returns to chieftain who names hero as tribe's prophesied one
Travels to second nomad camp in fertile grasslands
Speaks with tribal oracle about gaining recognition
Clears hostile creatures from desecrated shrine
Escorts oracle safely into inner shrine
Is named tribe's champion and receives sacred talisman
Travels to third nomad camp in contested territory
Speaks with oracle and learns of chieftain's demands
Presents luxury gift to chieftain to gain audience
Learns chieftain desires high-born bride from wizard clan
Acquires commoner and disguises her as noblewoman
Presents disguised "bride" and is named tribe's champion
Travels to fourth nomad camp in hostile territory
Speaks with oracle and learns chieftain will never accept outsider
Slays hostile chieftain and his supporters in combat
Recovers sacred items from slain warriors
Presents items to successor and convinces him to take leadership
Is named tribe's champion by newly installed chieftain
Receives summons from high priest of state religion
Travels to grand temple and meets with high priest
Learns that god-king wishes to meet with prophesied hero
Enters divine palace and speaks with living god
Listens to god's account of divine history and enemy's return
Receives protective artifact from god-king
Learns plan to sever power source using ancient tools
Receives locations of remaining divine weapons on map
Travels past magical barrier into blighted wasteland
Enters first enemy citadel near corrupted mountain
Battles through corrupted creatures to inner sanctum
Slays enemy champion and claims first divine weapon
Enters second enemy citadel deeper in blighted zone
Defeats second enemy champion and takes key
Ascends enemy tower and claims second divine weapon
Equips protective artifact before handling weapons to avoid death
Enters enemy lord's citadel at heart of corrupted mountain
Navigates through caverns toward inner sanctum
Confronts enemy lord who offers place at his side
Refuses enemy lord's offer and initiates combat
Defeats enemy lord knowing his form will regenerate
Takes ring from enemy and enters chamber of power source
Equips divine tools while facing enemy's power source
Strikes power source once with first tool to weaken it
Strikes power source repeatedly with second tool to destroy it
Watches as enemy lord perishes and war machine collapses
Escapes crumbling chamber as mountain shakes
Returns to outer cavern and meets divine apparition
Listens as deity proclaims prophecy fulfilled and curse lifted
Receives sacred ring as token of divine favor
Emerges from corrupted mountain as prophesied savior of realm
